---
title: "R as a Calculator"
format: live-html
engine: knitr
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}

Welcome to the **R as a Calculator** interactive tutorial! This page uses WebR and Quarto Live to run R code directly in your browser. You don't need to install anything—just click "Run Code" to see the results.

## 1. Basic Arithmetic Operations

In this section, we explore the fundamental arithmetic operators in R. Try running the code block below, and feel free to change the numbers to see how the output updates!

```{r}
crime <- read.csv("Data/Crime Data.csv")
```


```{webr}
# Read the data
crime
```

```{webr}

```

```{webr}

```
